title: The Press Council Act, 1978
full_text: The Press Council Act, 1978 प्रेस परिषद् अधिनियम, 1978 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197837 Act Number: 37 Enactment Date: 1978-09-07 Act Year: 1978 Short Title: The Press Council Act, 1978 Hindi Title: प्रेस परिषद् अधिनियम, 1978 Long Title: An Act to establish a Press Council for the purpose of preserving the freedom of the Press and of maintaining and improving the standards of newspapers and news agencies in India. Ministry: Ministry of Information and Broadcasting Enforcement Date: 07-09-1978 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Press Council Act, 1978 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ESTABLISHMENT OF THE PRESS COUNCIL CHAPTER III POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE COUNCIL CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Rule of construction respecting enactments not extending to the State of Jammu and Kashmir or Sikkim. Section 4. Incorporation of the Council. Section 5. Composition of the Council. Section 6. Term of office and retirement of members. Section 7. Conditions of service of members. Section 8. Committees of the Council. Section 9. Meetings of the Council and committees. Section 10. Vacancies among members or defect in the constitution not to invalidate acts and proceedings of the Council. Section 11. Staff of the Council. Section 12. Authentication of orders and other instruments of the Council. Section 13. Objects and functions of the Council. Section 14. Power to censure. Section 15. General powers of the Council. Section 16. Levy of fees. Section 17. Payments to the Council. Section 18. Fund of the Council. Section 19. Budget. Section 20. Annual report. Section 21. Interim reports. Section 22. Accounts and audit. Section 23. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 24. Members, etc., to be public servants. Section 25. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Amendment of Act 25 of 1867.
